creator: nwhitehorn@FreeBSD.org
text:
Are you sure SLOF is trying to boot from the CD? boot1 (the code that prints "Open Firmware boot block") is not installed on the CD, only on hard disks post-installation. It looks like it is trying to boot from a previously installed hard disk here.

If you enter SLOF (press S early) and then type boot cdrom, it should explicitly try to boot from the CD.
